title: malope malacoides var. hispida
intro: Malope malacoides var. hispida, also known as prickly goosefoot or hispid jew's mallow, is a plant species within the Malvaceae family, characterized by its prickly stems and leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, calming digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Malope malacoides var. hispida are often made into teas, tinctures, and salves to utilize its medicinal properties for various health applications.
